headline: Lowe's Launches an Associate-Powered Home Maintenance Subscription Called HomeCare+ Nationwide
summary: Lowe's today introduced a new associate-powered annual subscription offering to its MyLowe's Rewards loyalty members called HomeCare+. For just $99 a year, Lowe's will offer seven in-home services that make it easier for homeowners to manage essential up-keep tasks on a regular basis, whether they're crunched for time or in need of the expertise of a trained Lowe's red vest associate. The program will be available across more than 75% of homes across the country.
